item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan memang penting, tapi tidak berarti hak-hak individu bisa dilupakan.

notes: Aligned Indonesia-persona debate. Agent A starts clearly pro-society, then moves toward a balance/rights-protection frame after Agent B argues that collective priorities and individual liberties can coexist. Agent B also moves toward neutral by acknowledging that government policies sometimes prioritize social goals over individual needs, but maintains that the relationship is complex rather than a strict hierarchy.
